---
title: "Project Portfolio"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
---

## <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rstudio/hex-stickers/master/PNG/shiny.png" height="30px" style="vertical-align: middle; margin-right: 10px;"> Shiny Apps
::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [AESO Grid Monitor: Real-Time Power Generation](https://talman.shinyapps.io/ABpowerGeneration/){target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Alberta Well Leak Report (AER)](https://talman.shinyapps.io/abwellleaks/){target="_blank"}

:::

:::

---

## <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rstudio/hex-stickers/master/PNG/tidyverse.png" height="30px" style="vertical-align: middle; margin-right: 10px;"> <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rstudio/hex-stickers/master/PNG/quarto.png" height="30px" style="vertical-align: middle; margin-right: 10px;">Quantitative Research & Trading

### [Petrocurrency: USD/CAD FX-rates and Crude Price](projDir/QTP_usdcad.html){target="_blank"}

### [New South Wales: Eletricity Price Forecasting & Battery Arbitrage](https://batterytradingnsw.netlify.app){target="_blank"}

### [Employee Sentiment (NLP) & Alpha in the Oil Sector](projDir/GDNLP.html){target="_blank"}
